calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-28-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-20-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Aug-04-2021 is admitted to probate. Ralph Frischman is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Michael Kasolas is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Sep-26-2023 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed two weeks prior, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Cristobal. Not Reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Continued To Sep-20-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
